description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a dark wooden stock and a long, slender barrel. The rifle is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on top, indicating it is designed for precision shooting at distance. The stock is of a traditional fixed type, extending from the butt to the receiver, and features a smooth, polished finish. The barrel is standard and unadorned, with no visible muzzle device attached. The trigger guard and bolt handle are clearly visible, and the magazine is internal, integrated into the body of the rifle. The overall appearance is classic and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and mounted scope, featuring a long barrel and internal magazine. The finish is smooth and dark, with visible metal and wood components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, mounted scope, and bolt handle.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, scope, and bolt handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the scope along the barrel.
